title: Supporting refugees :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Starting a new life in a new country is not always easy. We help refugees and asylum seekers settle into communities, find work and gain access to health services.
- Refugees settling in New Zealand We have video tutorials and information to help refugees to settle into the community, and access the support and services they need.

## Refugees settling in New Zealand
We have video tutorials and information to help refugees to settle into the community, and access the support and services they need.
- Experiences of refugees in New Zealand In this series of videos, refugees talk about their experiences when they first arrived in New Zealand.

## Experiences of refugees in New Zealand
In this series of videos, refugees talk about their experiences when they first arrived in New Zealand.
- Refugee employment pilot In 2023 we began a refugee employment pilot project. This pilot is now closed to new enrolments and ends in December 2025.

## Refugee employment pilot
In 2023 we began a refugee employment pilot project. This pilot is now closed to new enrolments and ends in December 2025.
